text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is a well-known seminal work in information retrieval; the minor discrepancy in the author's name is due to character encoding/transliteration of the Scandinavian characters.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/582415.582418
FOUND_TITLE: Cumulated gain-based evaluation of IR techniques
FOUND_AUTHORS: Kalervo Järvelin, Jaana Kekäläinen
FOUND_YEAR: 2002
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
